tldr: Displaced Lebanese are returning to the south following a fragile ceasefire deal backed by the US and Iran.
Europe is grappling with a severe heatwave that has driven electricity prices to record highs and caused significant disruption in the UK.
Tesla is disputing claims that its Full Self-Driving system caused a fatal crash, stating the driver manually overrode the system.

market.why: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite experienced declines, largely due to a broader tech sell-off and investor apprehension regarding potential rate hikes. Everyday investors who fueled a trading frenzy in stocks like SpaceX are now facing a bear market.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield increased, likely driven by renewed concerns among investors about potential rate hikes. These fears also impacted precious metals like gold and silver, causing them to tumble.

vix.why: The VIX, often referred to as Wall Street's "fear gauge," rose significantly amid increased market volatility and a tech stock sell-off. This increase signals growing investor concern, with one report suggesting this tech-specific fear gauge is nearing a two-decade high.

tech.summary: Tesla is disputing claims that its Full Self-Driving system caused a fatal crash, asserting the driver manually overrode the system. This highlights ongoing debates regarding liability in autonomous vehicle incidents.

Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is reportedly developing a prediction markets app called "Arena" which will allow users to bet with points rather than real money. This move could impact existing prediction market platforms.

An AI memory startup recently secured $98 million in funding to focus on reducing token costs, addressing a growing expense problem within the AI industry. This innovation aims to make AI models more economically viable.

world.summary: Displaced Lebanese citizens are returning to southern regions following a fragile ceasefire deal, which was brokered with the backing of the US and Iran, halting months of Israeli bombardment.

A UN independent international commission of inquiry has found that Israel is deliberately targeting Palestinian children in Gaza, concluding this action constitutes genocide by undermining the Palestinian people's capacity to exist.

Europe is experiencing a severe heatwave, leading to record-high electricity prices as demand for air conditioning soaring and power plant output diminishing. The UK is also struggling with the heat affecting schools, hospitals, and transport.
